title: girardinia suborbiculata subsp. triloba
intro: Girardinia suborbiculata subsp. triloba, also known as trilobed girardinia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Girardinia suborbiculata subsp. triloba include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
